name: CondistFLInferencePiece
description: Runs inference on a NIfTI CT image using a trained CondistFL global model. Produces a multi-organ segmentation mask (8 classes: background, liver, liver_tumor, spleen, pancreas, pancreas_tumor, kidney, kidney_tumor) and a slice visualisation.

best_global_model_path.title: Best Global Model Path
best_global_model_path.description: Path to the best global model checkpoint (.pt file) from training

image_path.title: Image Path
image_path.description: Path to a NIfTI image file (.nii or .nii.gz) for inference

use_gpu.title: Use GPU
use_gpu.description: Whether to use GPU for inference (falls back to CPU if unavailable)

output_dir.title: Output Dir
output_dir.description: Directory to save inference outputs (mask and visualization)

segmentation_mask_path.title: Segmentation Mask Path
segmentation_mask_path.description: Path to the predicted segmentation mask NIfTI file

visualization_path.title: Visualization Path
visualization_path.description: Path to the slice visualization PNG file

class_names.title: Class Names
class_names.description: JSON string mapping class index to organ name
